events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. We are safety inspector. Work in-progress, Lockout/Tagout. Observed field condition: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). This is a serious hazard. Need identify hazards severity immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical? Stored energy can cause unexpected startup/movement, high pressure hydraulic, gravity loads, capacitor discharge. Severity high/critical. Since actively in progress and missed energy source, immediate exposure. Use critical. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant? The LOTO procedure/component is non-compliant because missed energy source. Maybe installed-defective not physical component. Use ["non-compliant"] maybe also "installed-defective"? The categories may apply: installed-defective, non-compliant. The energy isolation device or LOTO implementation is non-compliant. Could include both. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. findings: stored energy source not identified/isolated/relieved; incomplete LOTO; potential unexpected energization or startup; exposure to hydraulic pressure, gravity, electrical capacitor. actions: immediately stop work; re-establish LOTO; identify all energy sources including stored/residual; isolate, lockout, tagout each source; relieve/vent/block/store energy; verify zero energy state; retrain workers; update procedures; inspect before resume. references: OSHA 1910.147(c)(4) energy control procedure, (d) energy isolation, (e) stored energy, (f) verification of isolation. Need JSON only. Ensure valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "A stored/residual energy source was missed during lockout/tagout (hydraulic, gravity, and/or capacitor).",
    "Incomplete energy isolation creates risk of unexpected energization, motion, or discharge while workers are exposed.",
    "Current LOTO execution does not meet the required zero-energy-state verification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the work and clear personnel from the hazard zone.",
    "Re-establish lockout/tagout and identify all primary and residual energy sources.",
    "Isolate, lock out, and tag out every energy source with assigned individual locks/tags.",
    "Relieve, vent, block, or otherwise safely dissipate stored hydraulic, gravitational, and electrical capacitor energy.",
    "Verify zero energy state with qualified personnel before any work resumes.",
    "Review and update the LOTO procedure and retrain affected employees on stored energy control."
  ],
  "rationale": "Missing a stored energy source during active LOTO violates the core requirement to achieve and verify a zero-energy state, exposing workers to potentially fatal unexpected energization, gravity-driven motion, hydraulic pressure, or capacitor discharge.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4) - Energy control procedure",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d) - Application of controls and lockout/tagout",
    "OSHA 1910.147(e) - Stored or residual energy",
    "OSHA 1910.147(f) - Verification of isolation"
  ]
}
